zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk Fitzwarin VIII於1341年3月2日出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔時，他的父親Sir Fulk FitzWarin32歲，母親Joan De Beaumont20歲。他於1360年與Margaret de Audley在英國英格蘭史洛普爾艾姆德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1373年2月12日在英國英格蘭波克夏望塔享年31歲，埋葬在澳洲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulk Fitzwarin VIII于1341年3月2日出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔时，他的父亲Sir Fulk FitzWarin32岁，母亲Joan De Beaumont20岁。他于1360年与Margaret de Audley在英国英格兰史洛普爾艾姆德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1373年2月12日在英国英格兰波克夏望塔享年31岁，埋葬在澳大利亚。

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk Fitzwarin VIII was born on 2 March 1341, in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Fulk FitzWarin, was 32 and his mother, Joan De Beaumont, was 20. He married Margaret de Audley in 1360, in Edgmond, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 12 February 1373, in Wantage, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31, and was buried in Australia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk Fitzwarin VIII est né le 2 mars 1341, à Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Fulk FitzWarin, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan De Beaumont, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Audley en 1360, à Edgmond, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 12 février 1373, à Wantage, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Australie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulk Fitzwarin VIII am 2. März 1341 in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Fulk FitzWarin 32 und seine Mutter Joan De Beaumont 20. Er hat 1360 in Edgmond, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 12. Februar 1373 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Wantage, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Australien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk Fitzwarin VIII è nato il il 2 marzo 1341 nel Oswestry, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Fulk FitzWarin, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan De Beaumont, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Audley nel 1360, nel Edgmond, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 12 febbraio 1373, nel Wantage, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Australia.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulk Fitzwarin VIIIが1341年3月2日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアオスウエストリーで生まれた時，父Sir Fulk FitzWarinは32歳，母Joan De Beaumontは20歳であった。1360年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアエドグモンドでMargaret de Audleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1373年2月12日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアワンタッジで31歳で死去し，オーストラリアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Fulk Fitzwarin VIII(이)가 1341년 3월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 오스w스트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Fulk FitzWarin(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan De Beaumont(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 에지몽에서 Margaret de Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1373년 2월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 완타지에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트레일리아에 묻혔다.

pt.2 March 1341–12 February 1373: 2 de março de 1341–12 de fevereiro de 1373
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk Fitzwarin VIII nasceu em 2 de março de 1341, em Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Fulk FitzWarin, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan De Beaumont, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Audley em 1360, em Edgmond, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1373, em Wantage, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Austrália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk Fitzwarin VIII родился 2 марта 1341 г. в местности освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Fulk FitzWarin было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan De Beaumont, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Audley в 1360 г. в местности эджмонд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 12 февраля 1373 г. в местности вантадж, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности Австралия.

es.2 March 1341–12 February 1373: 2 de marzo de 1341–12 de febrero de 1373
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fulk Fitzwarin VIII nació el 2 de marzo de 1341, en Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Fulk FitzWarin, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan De Beaumont, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret de Audley en 1360, en Edgmond, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1373, en Wantage, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Australia.
